summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ECOMMBX Banking Application. Main fix verified: formatDate function in AdminKYC.js now properly handles ISO date strings with timezone offsets, displaying dates as '1/30/2026, 5:07:14 PM' instead of 'Invalid Date'. All backend APIs working (14/14 tests passed). All admin features tested and working correctly.
